answers.label: What is the counter-evidence?
evidence: Other horizons — Medium: strong long bias, Medium-long: strong long bias, Long: strong long bias.
insufficiency: The model does not describe every market regime equally well; extreme regimes can degrade performance.

answers.label: What do other horizons say?
evidence: Medium: strong long bias (confidence — live-data evidence).
Medium-long: strong long bias (confidence — live with caveats).
Long: strong long bias (confidence — sample scenario).
